name: weather
description: Get current weather and forecasts via wttr.in or Open-Meteo.
intent_triggers: 我需要處理 weather 相關工作
幫我啟用 weather 這個 skill
用 agent skill 完成 weather

task.description: Natural-language task or instruction for the agent skill.

examples.intent: Use the weather skill for this task.

error_codes.1: Skill invocation failed or required context was missing.
